description.ko: 창백한 별먼지가 연약한 섬처럼 모여 보이지 않는 심연의 존재 앞에 정지한 고요한 심우주 성운.
description.en: A silent deep-space nebula where pale star dust gathers into fragile islands, suspended before an unseen abyssal presence.

prompt: VOID-3 Cosmic Deep: a vast abyssal nebula captured as a silent field of suspended stellar embers, where dense #E6E6FA star dust forms thousands of faint, uneven islands across an ocean of pure #0D0221 void. Between the islands, transparent #3D1A78 ultraviolet vapor gathers into thin, glassy pressure veils that overlap at different depths, creating the impression of infinite space slowly folding inward without any visible source. Sparse #7B68EE lavender ion threads appear as delicate frost-like branching along the edges of the dust islands, revealing a cold gravitational presence too large to enter the frame. No spacecraft, planets, rings, vortex, central black hole, gate, eclipse, lattice, shell, chasm, prism, vessel, or flowing river structure; the image should feel like a forbidden long-exposure photograph of stars quietly separating into abyssal silence. Mysterious cosmic horror majesty, very slow celestial drift, high particle density, restrained lavender luminance, cold volumetric haze, ultra-detailed astrophotographic texture, deep space nebula atmosphere, stars dust scattered through the infinite void.
